## Question asked
What did you ask the chatbot?

## Answer received
What did the chatbot respond with?

## Correct answer
What should the correct answer be? Include sources if possible.

## Category
- [ ] Course information (wrong prereqs, wrong instructor, etc.)
- [ ] Faculty/staff (wrong contact info, wrong office, etc.)
- [ ] Policy (wrong deadline, wrong requirement, etc.)
- [ ] Campus resources (wrong location, wrong hours, etc.)
- [ ] Other
